faq.question: What's the difference between pressure washing and soft washing?
faq.answer: Pressure washing uses high-pressure water (1,300-3,100 PSI) for tough surfaces like concrete and driveways. Soft washing uses low pressure (under 500 PSI) with eco-friendly cleaning solutions, making it safe for delicate surfaces like roofs, siding, and painted wood.

faq.question: Is soft washing safe for my roof?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Soft washing is the method recommended by shingle manufacturers like GAF and CertainTeed. High-pressure washing can damage shingles and void your warranty. Our soft wash method cleans effectively without any risk to your roof.

faq.question: How often should I have my house washed?
faq.answer: We recommend exterior house washing every 1-2 years depending on your environment. Homes in shaded or humid areas may benefit from annual cleaning to prevent algae and mildew buildup.

faq.question: Are your cleaning solutions safe for plants and pets?
faq.answer: Yes! We use 100% biodegradable, eco-friendly cleaning solutions that are safe for your landscaping, pets, and family. We also take extra precautions to pre-rinse and protect plant beds during service.

faq.question: Do you offer free estimates?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide completely free, no-obligation estimates. Call us or fill out our contact form and we'll get back to you quickly â usually within a few hours.

faq.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, Suds Away Pro Wash is fully licensed and insured, including general liability insurance. Your property is always protected when you work with us.
